title: Introducing Automations: always-on coding agents
summary: Cursor introduces Automations, a feature for building always-on coding agents that run on schedules or are triggered by events from tools like Slack, Linear, GitHub, and PagerDuty. The agents can be activated by messages, issue creation, pull requests, or incidents.
